name: WF-07: Populer Icerik Hesaplama
description: Her 6 saatte — en cok kaydedilen tasarim/urun ve en cok mesaj alan tasarimcilari hesapla

config.query: SELECT item_id, COUNT(*) as score FROM saved_items WHERE item_type = 'design' AND created_at > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY item_id ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT item_id, COUNT(*) as score FROM saved_items WHERE item_type = 'product' AND created_at > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY item_id ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT designer_id as item_id, COUNT(*) as score FROM koala_conversations WHERE created_at > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY designer_id ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 10

config.data: Merge step 2-4 results with type labels
config.note: Her sonucu type='design'|'product'|'designer', period='weekly' ile upsert et
